_docs._overview: SETTINGS.JSON - Central configuration for Kaya. Copy this file to settings.json and customize.

_sections.env: Environment variables. KAYA_DIR should point to your installation directory.
_sections.permissions: Tool permissions. Pre-configured for security and usability.
_sections.hooks: Lifecycle hook configuration. Each hook fires at a specific point in the session lifecycle.
_sections.daidentity: AI identity configuration. Name, voice, color, and personality.
_sections.principal: Your identity. Set your name and timezone.
_sections.contextFiles: Files loaded into every session for persistent context.
